'''Mallet Squadron''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] starfighter squadron made up of [[R-41 Starchaser]]s. It was attached to the Airam [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] ''[[Anat]]''. When its mothership engaged Imperial forces near the [[Blair Cluster/Legends|Blair Cluster]], it participated in the battle, being tasked with driving off Interdictor ''[[Compellor]]'', and was wiped out by [[Avenger Squadron|Avenger]] and Gamma squadrons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
